antiPatterns.description: Hardcoding prices or tier amounts in components
antiPatterns.avoid: PricingComparison tiers with $50, $546 in TSX; LeaguesSection $48/year in copy
antiPatterns.instead: Source from /data/*.json or lib/programs-data; component only renders

antiPatterns.description: Same list of programs/options defined in multiple places
antiPatterns.avoid: TrialBookingModal programs array and app/book/page.tsx programs constant
antiPatterns.instead: Single source (data file or lib helper); both modal and page import

antiPatterns.description: Returning 200 with success: false on webhook processing failure
antiPatterns.avoid: catch block returns NextResponse.json({ success: false }) with no status
antiPatterns.instead: NextResponse.json(..., { status: 500 }) for server/processing errors

antiPatterns.description: Closing a modal without restoring focus to the trigger
antiPatterns.avoid: handleClose only calls onClose(); user tab lands nowhere predictable
antiPatterns.instead: Save document.activeElement (or trigger ref) on open; focus() in close

antiPatterns.description: Icon-only button with no accessible name
antiPatterns.avoid: <button><SendIcon /></button>
antiPatterns.instead: aria-label="Send message" or visible text

antiPatterns.description: UI component that POSTs to an API route that does not exist
antiPatterns.avoid: ChatWidget POST /api/chat with no app/api/chat/route.ts
antiPatterns.instead: Implement the route with validation and rate limit, or disable the UI

antiPatterns.description: Making webhook verification skip when secret env is unset
antiPatterns.avoid: if (!secret) return null; // skip verification
antiPatterns.instead: In production, require secret and reject request when unset

antiPatterns.description: Keeping state or refs that are set but never read
antiPatterns.avoid: isMobile, setIsMobile + resize effect; containerRef with no .current read
antiPatterns.instead: Remove before merge (YAGNI)

antiPatterns.description: API route reimplements JSON parse with request.json() try/catch when parseJsonBody exists
antiPatterns.avoid: try { body = await request.json() } catch { return 400 } in one route while others use parseJsonBody
antiPatterns.instead: Use parseJsonBody(request) from lib/validations for every JSON route; return parsed.response when !parsed.ok

antiPatterns.description: Modal that uses setTimeout/setInterval does not clear it on unmount
antiPatterns.avoid: setTimeout id stored but cleanup never runs clearTimeout; setState may run after unmount
antiPatterns.instead: Store id in ref; useEffect cleanup: return () => { if (ref.current) clearTimeout(ref.current); }

antiPatterns.description: Modal that auto-closes (e.g. success timeout) does not restore focus
antiPatterns.avoid: Only manual close restores focus; timeout callback only setVisible(false)
antiPatterns.instead: In timeout callback: previousActiveRef.current?.focus(); then setVisible(false)

antiPatterns.description: Using Sunset Cliff (orange) as primary CTA fill on page heroes
antiPatterns.avoid: bg-brand-sunset-cliff for main hero or primary section CTA
antiPatterns.instead: Black/white or .btn-primary per .cursorrules; Sunset Cliff for hover/accent only

antiPatterns.description: Footer or dark-section text at low opacity failing WCAG 7:1
antiPatterns.avoid: text-white/40 or text-white/25 on bg-brand-deep-water for body or tagline
antiPatterns.instead: Use text-white/50 or higher (or verify 7:1 with WebAIM); secondary text at least /50

antiPatterns.description: Primary hero button with only text color on dark background
antiPatterns.avoid: text-black or text-white with no background on dark gradient (e.g. from-black/75)
antiPatterns.instead: Use solid background (bg-white text-black or bg-black text-white) so contrast meets WCAG

antiPatterns.description: Using payload ID in webhook URLs or request bodies without validating
antiPatterns.avoid: contactId = data.contact?.id; then `${baseUrl}/contacts/${contactId}` without type/length check
antiPatterns.instead: Normalize to positive integer; return 400 if invalid; use only the validated number in URLs and bodies

antiPatterns.description: Comparing webhook secret with == or === (timing side-channel)
antiPatterns.avoid: if (headerSecret === AC_WEBHOOK_SECRET) return null
antiPatterns.instead: Buffer.from both; ensure same length; crypto.timingSafeEqual(expected, provided); reject on mismatch or length diff

antiPatterns.description: Parallax or scroll-driven animation without checking prefers-reduced-motion
antiPatterns.avoid: useEffect scroll listener that updates transform/parallax state on every scroll with no reduceMotion check
antiPatterns.instead: Gate with matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)'); when true disable parallax or use static fallback (same as HomeHero)

antiPatterns.description: Blockquote with solid left border instead of Brand Guide pull-quote style
antiPatterns.avoid: border-l-2 border-brand-pacific-dusk/30 or similar on blockquote
antiPatterns.instead: Use <PullQuote> or class section-quote for gradient left edge (Victoria Cove → Sunset Cliff); single source for quote styling

antiPatterns.description: Decorative SVG (arrow, icon) inside link or button without aria-hidden
antiPatterns.avoid: <Link><svg>...</svg> Text</Link> with no aria-hidden on svg
antiPatterns.instead: Add aria-hidden="true" to the svg so screen readers don't announce the icon

antiPatterns.description: Using Tailwind color class not defined in tailwind.config (e.g. lbta-tan)
antiPatterns.avoid: bg-lbta-tan or text-lbta-tan when lbta.tan is not in config
antiPatterns.instead: Use only defined tokens: lbta-beige or brand-sandstone for warm backgrounds; grep config before adding custom color classes
